title: Neo Optimized
description: ModPack For Fps Boost In Latest Version
body:
🧩 NEO OPTIMIZED – Minecraft FPS & Optimization Modpack

NEO OPTIMIZED is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack designed to maximize FPS, reduce stutters, and improve overall gameplay smoothness — ideal for PvP, Survival, and low-end PCs.

✨ Features:

🚀 Massive FPS Boost • Tweaked configs and optimization mods to increase frame rates instantly

🧠 Memory Optimization • Reduces RAM usage and improves chunk loading

🌍 Smooth World Loading • Faster startup and less lag when exploring

🔧 Easy Installation • Plug & play — no manual setup required

🧊 Shader & Resource Pack Compatible • Works seamlessly with your favorite visual enhancements

⚙️ Included Optimization Mods (Examples): • Sodium – Better rendering & higher FPS • Lithium – Optimizes server-side performance • Starlight – Lighting engine improvement • Entity Culling – Hides unseen entities • Memory Leak Fix – Improves stability • Krypton – Network performance boost • LazyDFU – Faster game startup

💻 Recommended For: • Low-end & mid-end PCs
• PvP players
• Builders who want smoother gameplay
• Anyone wanting better performance without losing the vanilla feel

⚠ Note: Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1 – 1.21.11
